turns.user: "Cho tôi citation BibTeX của bài Attention Is All You Need"
turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là citation BibTeX cho bài báo "Attention Is All You Need":

```bibtex
@inproceedings{vaswani2017attention,
  title={Attention is all you need},
  author={Vaswani, Ashish and Shardlow, Matthew and Parmar, Niki and Uszkoreit, Jakob and Jones, Llion and Gomez, Aidan N and Kaiser, Łukasz and Kattner, Florian and N. K. and Polosukhin, Ilya and et al.},
  booktitle={Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems},
  pages={5998--6008},
  year={2017}
}
```

Bạn có thể điều chỉnh thông tin nếu cần thiết.
